name: Grades
description: One row per course — where your grade stands now, where you want it, and what it'll take.

rows.title: Calculus II
rows.notes: Strong on problem sets. Partial fractions is the weak spot before the final — drill it.

rows.title: Microeconomics
rows.notes: Quiz went well. Deadweight-loss diagrams cost points last time; redo the graph practice.

rows.title: Modern History
rows.notes: Essays are fine; dates and causal chains need flashcards before the midterm.

rows.title: Statistics
rows.notes: Labs are graded well. Need to make the leap from formulas to interpreting results in words.

rows.title: English Literature
rows.notes: Close reading is a strength. Push thesis statements to be sharper and more arguable.

rows.title: Linear Algebra
rows.notes: Mechanics are solid; the abstract chapters (vector spaces, basis) need real review time.
